name: Almadex Minerals Ltd.
description: Almadex Minerals Ltd. is an exploration company that holds a large portfolio of exploration projects, royalty interests, and drilling equipment. The company is focused on the discovery and development of mineral properties in North America, with a particular emphasis on gold, silver, and copper projects in Mexico, Canada, and the United States. Almadex utilizes its own drill rigs and experienced team to cost-effectively explore its extensive property portfolio and create value for its shareholders.
